{{Infobox character
| name = Clockworker
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|lock physical objects in place}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

''See also: [[Clockworker Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Clockworker, whose real name is [[Jyrid]], is an elderly human male and a long-standing member of the Advocates. He possesses a scholarly appearance, characterized by gray hair and a researcher-like countenance. As an [[Advocate]], he wears a bronze full-body suit featuring the organization's insignia and a specialized helmet designed with clockwork elements. He is one of the rare individuals whom [[Starhammer]] considers a trusted ally, though he was later accused of betrayal by that same figure. In combat or utility, he wields a versatile shimmering power capable of immobilizing physical objects regardless of their velocity or mass. During recent conflicts, he demonstrated the ability to use his powers for protection, though he also experienced significant internal struggle and emotional distress regarding the nature of malfunctioning machines.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Clockworker is the name used by [[Jyrid]], an elderly human man with gray hair and a prominent member of the Advocates. He wears a full-body suit of bronze featuring an 'A' on his chest and a helmet that operates using the hands of an ancient clock. While possessing the power to lock physical objects in place, he ultimately betrayed the Advocates and let [[Starhammer]] down.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] is an elderly human man and a member of the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] has gray hair.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] is a name used for [[Jyrid]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] wears a full-body suit of bronze with the [[Advocate]] 'A' on his chest.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]]'s helmet is bronze and functions with the hands of an ancient clock.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] has the power to lock physical objects in place.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] was a prominent member of the Advocates who betrayed them.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c42">''The Engineer'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] let [[Starhammer]] down.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Jyrid?” she asked the old man whom most called Clockworker.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|He wore a full-body suit of bronze with the Advocate “A” on his chest.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Advocates]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
